jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CONCOR
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Fleet Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
